name: Macaroni and Cheese Quiche
recipeInstructions: Prepare macaroni and cheese as directed, using 2 tablespoons milk instead of the specified amount. Add eggs and mix well. Spread over bottom and sides of a greased 7x11 inch baking dish. Toss cheese with flour and add remaining ingredients. Pour this mixture over the macaroni and cheese. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes. Remove from oven and loosely cover with foil, then bake for an additional 20 minutes or until set. Let cool a few minutes before cutting.
